zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House於1400年出生在英國賀福爾福可利 帕克時，他的父親Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire21歲，母親Elizabeth de Barton18歲。他於1419年與Cecilia de Englefield在英國奧可福爾利可特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年7月6日在英國倫敦享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House was born in 1400, in Foxley Park, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth de Barton, was 18. He married Cecilia de Englefield in 1419, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 6 July 1452, in London, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House est né en 1400, à Foxley Park, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Barton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia d’Englefield en 1419, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1452, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House è nato il nel 1400 nel Foxley Park, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Barton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia de Englefield nel 1419, nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 luglio 1452, nel London, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House(이)가 1400년 영국 허퍼드실르 폭스리 박에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Barton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 Cecilia de Englefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 7월 6일 영국 런던에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House nasceu em 1400, em Foxley Park, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Barton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia de Englefield em 1419, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1452, em London, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.< Boston Borough, Holland Fen, Lincolnsh: холланд фен чурч, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House родился в 1400 г. в местности фоксли парк, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Barton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia de Englefield в 1419 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 6 июля 1452 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Cecilia de Englefield en 1419, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de julio de 1452, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
